name: Single filer at median income in Zürich
description: Standard case for single person earning CHF 80,000 in Zürich canton

sources.description: Calculated using official 2025 federal tax brackets from PWC Tax Summaries
sources.notes: Federal tax ~980 CHF on taxable income (gross minus social/standard deductions). Cantonal: bracket_tax (50k×8% + 30k×12% = 7,600). Social 6.4%.
